# LanguageTag

**Structure**

A wrapper around an IETF language tag.

## Declaration

```swift
struct LanguageTag
```

## Overview

To learn more about the IETF worldwide standard for language tags, see [https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5646].

## Creating a Language Tag

- **init(extendedGraphemeClusterLiteral:)**: Creates an instance initialized to the given value.
- **init(stringLiteral:)**: Creates an instance initialized to the given value.
- **init(unicodeScalarLiteral:)**: Creates an instance initialized to the given value.
- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates a new instance with the specified raw value.

## Describing a Language Tag

- **description**: A textual representation of the language tag.

## Default Implementations

- **CustomStringConvertible Implementations**
- **ExpressibleByExtendedGraphemeClusterLiteral Implementations**
- **ExpressibleByStringLiteral Implementations**
- **ExpressibleByUnicodeScalarLiteral Implementations**
- **RawRepresentable Implementations**

## Localizing Package Resources

- **defaultLocalization**: The default localization for resources.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByExtendedGraphemeClusterLiteral
- ExpressibleByStringLiteral
- ExpressibleByUnicodeScalarLiteral
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
